Graphics Functions

This section contains reference information for the graphics functions provided by xgraphics.lib.

  • XFONT_OpenBitmapFontFromMemory
  • XFONT_OpenDefaultFont
  • XFONT_OpenTrueTypeFont

  • XGUnswizzleRect
  • XGSwizzleBox
  • XGUnswizzleBox
  • XGBuffer_GetBufferPointer
  • XGBuffer_GetBufferSize
  • XGBufferCreate
  • XGBytesPerPixelFromFormat
  • XGCompileDrawIndexedVertices
  • XGCompressRect
  • XGIsSwizzledFormat
  • XGSetCubeTextureHeader
  • XGSetFixupHeader
  • XGSetIndexBufferHeader
  • XGSetPaletteHeader
  • XGSetPushBufferHeader
  • XGSetSurfaceHeader
  • XGSetTextureHeader
  • XGSetVertexBufferHeader
  • XGSetVolumeTextureHeader
  • XGSpliceVertexShaders
  • XGSUCode_CompareVertexShaders
  • XGSUCode_GetVertexShaderType
  • XGSUCode_GetVertexShaderLength
  • XGWriteSurfaceToFile
